task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the OpenCAD system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD dashboard or interface is visible in the web browser, indicating successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify a 10-31 armed robbery call was created with the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An active call or dispatch record showing call type '10-31' (or Armed Robbery) located at the intersection of 'Vinewood Boulevard' and 'Hawick Avenue'.

task_completion.description: Verify the call includes the required incident details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The call notes or description explicitly mention a 'blue Karin Kuruma', plate 'RPZ-7851', and a 'Hispanic male' suspect in a 'brown leather jacket'.

task_completion.description: Verify a vehicle BOLO was issued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A BOLO (Be On the Look Out) record specifically created for a vehicle matching the 'Karin Kuruma' with license plate 'RPZ-7851'.

task_completion.description: Verify a person BOLO was issued.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A BOLO record specifically created for a person matching the description of a 'Hispanic male' suspect in a 'brown leather jacket'.

task_completion.description: Verify an active warrant was added for Trevor Philips.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A warrant record for 'Trevor Philips' showing the charge 'Armed Robbery' and the issuing agency as 'Blaine County Sheriff Office'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenCAD web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the OpenCAD application, not terminal commands, curl requests, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the forms in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Success messages, updated tables, or active records in the OpenCAD system showing the data was saved, rather than just typed into unsaved forms or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to manipulate the DOM to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The call type must be '10-31' (Crime in Progress). The location must include 'Vinewood Boulevard' and 'Hawick Avenue'. The vehicle plate is 'RPZ-7851'. The warrant must be for 'Trevor Philips' (database ID 3).
